description: Business letter from Sulaymān to Abū l-Munajjā. In Judaeo-Arabic. He reports that he has sent some items with al-Thiqa (l. 11) and wishes to know if they have arrived and how they are priced. He also wants to know if there is an ambergris (ʿanbar) in Alexandria. Mentions Abū Saʿd Ibn Nānū and a certain Hilāl. The sender intends to travel soon with Abū l-Munā. Regards from various people including from the sender's parents. (Information in part from CUDL)
